title: Groups Duplication and Automation rule
excerpt:
Can anyone please tell me how to set up an automation that “every time a group is created, it will create a duplicate in a separate board?” 
Thank you!

posts.author: TJ_S (TJS)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can anyone please tell me how to set up an automation that “every time a group is created, it will create a duplicate in a separate board?”

Thank you!

posts.author: cassievaughn (Cassie Vaughn)
posts.cookedHtml:
@TJ_S thanks for your question! At the moment, duplicating groups across boards is not possible. The most efficient way to create this experience would be to duplicate the group on the existing board, then click the dropdown on the duplicated group and select “Move group to board”.

I hope this helps! Let me know if you have any additional questions.

posts.author: JacksonBarry (Jackson Barry)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @cassievaughn I really need this feature too. Our projects are organized by group with workspaces being the departments, so when we get a new project a group with the same name needs to be added to each dept. workspace. It would also be great to have an item automate a new group in another board of the same name. Thanks
